reviews.comment:
Hay amplio estacionamiento arbolado. Hay bar y restaurante.  No son tan completos como en las full. El baño de mujeres siempre tiene mucha cola y no están tan limpios.

(Translated by Google)
There's ample shaded parking. There's a bar and restaurant. They're not as well-equipped as the full-service resorts. The women's restroom always has a long line and isn't very clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSeXNEM2Z3EAE

reviews.comment:
Un solo baño funcionando, un asco, no tiene el valor de los combustibles, no hay agua caliente, el precio de nafta super $214 la más cara de Buenos Aires.

(Translated by Google)
Only one bathroom working, disgusting, fuel prices are not as high as usual, there is no hot water, and the price of premium gasoline is $214, the most expensive in Buenos Aires.
